10970371360.text: you are in a maze, its dark. There are two paths ahead of you.
10970371360.left_option: turn left and walk through the vines
10970371360.right_option: go right and swim through the lake

10970379664.text: the vines give way to another fork in the path. theres light coming in through the bushes on the left
10970379664.left_option: try to crawl out of the maze through the bushes
10970379664.right_option: ignore the light and walk straight

10970380624.text: you got further into the dark maze and reach a dead end. you dont know where to gp. you lost

10970380576.text: the lake has crocodiles. you have lsost
